name: Sunderer of Fortresses

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a FORTIFICATION, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

note: Bonuses are conditional on target type and differ (VEHICLE: +1, FORTIFICATION: +2).

name: Defender’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time an attack is allocated to that model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

note: Shows ? damage reduction; actual is fixed -1 to Damage characteristic per attack.

name: Selfless Protector

src.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Knight Defender model, that model has the Benefit of Cover and a 4+ invulnerable save against that attack.

note: Generated scope contradicts official; applies to IMPERIAL KNIGHTS from army, not a shared aura.

name: Acheron’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, at the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when they do.

note: Battle-shock test correct; omits -1 penalty to test and timing (start of Fight phase).

name: Searing Flames

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

note: Generated says benefit of cover (wrong direction); actual denies benefit of cover to hit targets.

name: Castigator’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, its ranged weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and the Armour Penetration characteristic of its ranged weapons is improved by 1.

note: Sustained Hits 1 correct; omits AP improvement for ranged weapons.

name: Storm of Bolts

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Debuff applies to suppressed enemies; generated omits suppressed status and unit-type restrictions.

name: Paladin’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, weapons equipped by that model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability, and melee weapons equipped by that model have the [LANCE] ability.

note: Lethal Hits correct; omits LANCE ability on melee weapons.

name: Seasoned Noble

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

note: AP improvement only applies against closest eligible targets; condition underspecified.

name: Errant’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for that model and ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [ASSAULT] ability.

note: Assault on ranged weapons correct; omits re-roll Advance rolls.

name: Aggressive Assault

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Hit bonus only vs closest targets; generated presents as unconditional.

name: Punishing Salvoes

src.description: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

note: Sustained Hits 1 correct; omits Movement phase Remains Stationary condition.

name: Thin Their Ranks

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

note: Devastating Wounds correct; omits unit-type restriction (excludes MONSTERS/VEHICLES).

name: Mentor (Bondsman)

src.description: Each time a model affected by this ability makes an attack that targets this model’s quarry, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

note: Generated omits quarry mechanic; wound re-roll applies only when targeting quarry.

name: Exemplar of the Code

src.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

note: Quarry selection at battle start omitted; re-roll applies only when targeting quarry.

name: Shock Charge

src.description: You can target this model with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

note: Free Tank Shock stratagem correct; duration is battle-wide but scope is self only.

name: Protection Protocols

src.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

note: Shows ? CP; actual grants free Heroic Intervention stratagem (same as other duty bondsmen).

name: Martial Pride

src.description: Each time this unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3"provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

note: Generated says +3" consolidation; actual is conditional +3" when end in Engagement Range.

name: Impetuous Glory

src.description: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain‑cleaver – strike profile, and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain‑cleaver – sweep profile.

note: Generated generic +1A; actual gives different bonuses per weapon profile after charge move.

name: Ion Aegis (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly ARMIGER model is within 6"of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that model, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

note: Scope correct but duration wrong; applies to ARMIGER models in range, not enemy debuff.

name: Thundershock

src.description: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s thundercoil harpoon, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for each other enemy unit within 6"of the target unit. On a 4+, the unit being rolled for is struck by arcing energies; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by arcing energies suffers D3 mortal wounds.

note: Shows d3 mortal wounds; actual scales per target based on separate D6 rolls with 4+ threshold.

name: Lone Operative

src.description: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

note: Condition correct; omits unless-part-of-attached-unit qualifier.

name: Using Sir Hekhtur

src.description: If your Canis Rex model is destroyed, this model is treated as a model disembarking from a destroyed TRANSPORT and must perform an Emergency Disembarkation. Sir Hekhtur cannot be selected as the target of any of your Stratagems other than Core Stratagems. Your Canis Rex unit is not considered to be destroyed until Sir Hekhtur is also destroyed.

note: Generated vague "special embark rule"; actual complex disembarkation and stratagem restrictions.

name: Legendary Freeblade

src.description: Once per turn, you can target this model with a Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem in the same phase.

note: Shows ? CP; actual grants one free stratagem per turn instead of CP refund.

name: Chainbreaker

src.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly IMPERIUM unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12"of this model. That unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

note: Scope unclear (aura vs auto-cast), doesn't specify Battle-shocked condition or action economy.

name: Titan Hunter

src.description: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

note: Applies to all shooting but triggers only on MONSTER/VEHICLE targets; scope is too broad.

name: Suppression Protocols

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Armiger autocannon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Omits Armiger autocannon requirement and debuff duration (until next turn start).

name: Magaera’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

note: Shows Strength bonus missing, requires closest target condition, not all ranged attacks.

name: Styrix’s Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model is selected to shoot or fight, after it has resolved all of its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks - that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from the test when doing so.

note: Omits -1 to Battle-shock test modifier and triggering action (shoot/fight).

name: Atrapos’ Duty (Bondsman)

src.description: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes an attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING model, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

note: Applies to all attacks but only TITANIC/TOWERING targets; scope is overstated.

name: Macro-extinction Protocols

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is TITANIC or TOWERING, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

note: Second bonus only applies if TITANIC/TOWERING; structure suggests independent bonuses.

name: Harbingers of Dread

src.description:
If your Army Faction is CHAOS KNIGHTS, each unit from your army with this ability gains Dread abilities, depending which are active for your army (see below). The Deathly Terror ability is active for your army from the start of the battle. In addition, at the start of the first, third and fifth battle rounds, you can either select one of the other Dread abilities or randomly select two Dread abilities to apply by rolling two D6 and applying the results rolled, from those numbered 1-6 below.

Any Dread abilities that have been selected are active until the end of the battle. You cannot select the same Dread ability more than once, and any duplicated Dread abilities (as a result of randomly selecting them) have no additional effect.While an enemy unit is within 9"of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1While an enemy unit is within 9"of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. This is cumulative with the Deathly Terror ability [see above].Each time this model makes an attack, if the target of that attack is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll.Each time an attack is made against this model, if the attacking unit is Battle-shocked or more than 18"away, subtract 1 from the Hit rollIn the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, for each enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 9"of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.While an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength is within 9"of this model, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds.Add 3"to the range of this model’s Aura abilities.

note: Barely captures dread mechanics; missing army-faction requirement and phase-based selections.

name: Super-heavy Walker

src.description:
Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4"or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4"in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6:on a 1, that model is Battle-shocked.

note: Terrain height logic is garbled (0" modifiers); movement constraints are muddled.

name: Dreadblades

src.description: If every model in your army has the CHAOS keyword, you can include either 1 TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS model or up to 3 WAR DOG models in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. None of these models can be your WARLORD, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

note: Generic metadata descriptor misses army composition & keyword requirements entirely.
